accepted: an aggregate offline conformance kit for OS-01 through OS-07
six community contribution classes and a closed submission schema
a five-level claim ladder that never infers physical evidence from conformance or simulation
six synthetic submission examples spanning every contribution class
a ten-function decision matrix across five addon families with every requested decision field
no aggregate score, universal bearer winner, mandatory vendor, SKU, hardware or paywall
append-only community review preserving rejected submissions and negative results
life-safety preservation before destructive minimization without false authentication
offline Apache-2.0 publication guidance and exact-version evidence rules
twelve residuals with resolved, controlled, planned or evidence-required dispositions
not_accepted: physical hardware possession, procurement, custody or inspection
lab or field validation for any component, bearer, build or adapter
RF coverage, coexistence, airtime capacity or regulatory authorization
72-hour energy autonomy, solar sustainability or electrical certification
human comprehension, operational rescue outcome or field readiness
victim presence, absence, identity, diagnosis, acoustic range or sensor performance
50,000-site throughput, latency, capacity or representative multi-team performance
promotion of any current adapter or hardware combination to supported
